news.t: 4 Active ETFs to Ride India's Comeback
Vault Strategic Joins National Defense Industrial Association (NDIA)

holdings.infoBox: NDIA is an equity ETF with a total of 33 individual holdings. The top holdings are HDFC Bank stock at 7.96%, ICICI Bank at 7.84%, Reliance Industries at 7.14%, Axis Bank at 5.97%, and Bharti Airtel at 5.40%.

overview.description: The Global X India Active ETF (NDIA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund seeks long-term growth of capital by investing in a concentrated portfolio of Indian equities. The fund uses bottom-up, fundamental analysis to actively select and manage its holdings. NDIA was launched on Aug 17, 2023 and is issued by Global X.

data.title: 4 Active ETFs to Ride India's Comeback
data.text: India's youthful population is more interested in domestic consumption than citizens in export-focused nations like China and Japan. That should drive growth for local businesses.
